allow: Bash(node -e "const Database = require\(''C:/Users/meetr/OneDrive/Desktop/Projects/Claude_Projects/Claude_Certification/connectrylab-architect-cert-mcp-master/node_modules/better-sqlite3''\);const db = new Database\(''C:/Users/meetr/.connectry-architect/progress.db''\);const exam = db.prepare\(''SELECT questionIds, answeredQuestionIds FROM exam_attempts WHERE id = 2''\).get\(\);const all = JSON.parse\(exam.questionIds\);const answered = JSON.parse\(exam.answeredQuestionIds\);const remaining = all.filter\(id => !answered.includes\(id\)\);console.log\(remaining[0]\);")

Bash(node -e "const Database = require\(''C:/Users/meetr/OneDrive/Desktop/Projects/Claude_Projects/Claude_Certification/connectrylab-architect-cert-mcp-master/node_modules/better-sqlite3''\);const db = new Database\(''C:/Users/meetr/.connectry-architect/progress.db''\);const exam = db.prepare\(''SELECT questionIds, answeredQuestionIds FROM exam_attempts WHERE id = 2''\).get\(\);const all = JSON.parse\(exam.questionIds\);const answered = JSON.parse\(exam.answeredQuestionIds\);const remaining = all.filter\(id => answered.indexOf\(id\) === -1\);console.log\(remaining[0]\);")
